title: Vietnamese-Style Grilled Pork with Tangy Walnut Sauce
description: A fusion of Vietnamese and Western flavors, this dish combines the richness of walnut sauce with the bold flavors of grilled pork. Serve with steamed mi.

ingredients.name: Tangy walnut sauce
ingredients.notes: See notes for homemade sauce recipe

instructions: 1. In a small bowl, whisk together chili sauce, walnut oil, and 2 tablespoons of water. Set aside.
3. In a large bowl, whisk together tangy walnut sauce, fish sauce (if using), and 1 tablespoon of water.
4. Add sliced pork to the bowl and toss to coat with the sauce.
5. Grill the pork for 5-7 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
6. Meanwhile, cook mi according to package instructions.
7. To serve, place a portion of mi on each plate, then top with a slice of grilled pork and spoon some of the tangy walnut sauce over the top.
8. Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve with a lime wedge on the side.
